dc_description: A shaded dirt road runs through dense woodland, curving slightly into a darker tree-covered corridor. On the right side, a metal signpost holds a large red directional sign reading "Via Francigena sentiero alternativo" with an arrow pointing left, plus a smaller red arrow sign below. A loaded touring bicycle is leaned against vegetation near the roadside beneath the signs. The scene has strong daylight filtering through foliage, creating patches of sun and shadow across the gravel surface.
novel_visual_observations: The road surface is dry, pale, and dusty with scattered leaves and small stones. The bicycle has visible bags and gear attached, including a cylindrical white item on the rear.
rich_context: Vicolo Formellese, Municipio Roma XV, Roma, Roma Capitale, Lazio, Italia
